title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.160 - Good boats and sufficient hands to be kept
text:
237.160.  Good boats and sufficient hands to be kept. — Every ferryman shall keep at his ferry a good boat or boats, in good repair, suitable to the water, and sufficient hands to attend on all occasions.
(RSMo 1939 § 15294) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14206; 1919 § 5540; 1909 § 6483
